scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w mcp-server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w mcp-server
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start:server: concurrently "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
